purpose: Reusable blocks for signup-generated 600B candidate profiles, avatar prompts, and RPG cards.
hard_rules: Do not frame new people as cult members.
Do not include private Nostr keys or LNbits keys.
Do not write names, handles, or job titles into team images.
Use the sacred number only in the stacked layout.
The sacred stone is small and round.
Animals are companions or pets for VRM work, not avatar bodies.

archetypes.label: Time Gardener
archetypes.story_function: Turns locked time into visible growth.

archetypes.label: Node Runner
archetypes.story_function: Keeps routes, relays, and accounts reachable.

archetypes.label: Party Catalyst
archetypes.story_function: Turns gatherings into signal and memory.

archetypes.label: Artifact Crafter
archetypes.story_function: Makes useful objects from meme, story, and patience.

archetypes.label: Wasteland Scout
archetypes.story_function: Finds proof and routes through noisy terrain.

archetypes.label: Palace Archivist
archetypes.story_function: Keeps decisions, images, and identities traceable.

silhouettes: open-stance connector between two light paths
workbench crafter with one iconic object

companions.label: Small boar companion
companions.prompt_cue: small boar companion beside the character, not the avatar body

companions.label: Small donkey companion
companions.prompt_cue: small donkey companion carrying a tiny pack, not the avatar body

companions.label: Raccoon-mask echo
companions.prompt_cue: small mask charm or patch echo, not a second character

environments: node room with warm relay lights
